F

The Sovereign

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3302-06-02 · 11 mentions
Active: 3302-06-02 → 3308-09-15
Description

The Sovereign is an independent newsfeed that reported on the mysterious disappearance of actor Consuela Knight and her crew in January 3305. Knight's luxury yacht arrived at port completely empty, with all five people — including the celebrity herself — having simultaneously vanished minutes before arrival, leaving unfinished meals and handheld equipment behind.

The Sovereign's coverage of the baffling incident noted that the ship was in perfect condition with all escape pods intact, and that engineering and hyperspace experts found no survivors. The case became one of the era's most enduring mysteries, spawning conspiracy theories about hyperspace anomalies and Thargoid involvement. The Sovereign also covered the Dangerous Games Wildcard competition later that year, with reporter Trinity Avon commenting on the EG Pilots' victory.

Mentions Timeline (11 articles)
3308-09-15
‘Thargoid Roar’ Leaked to Public
Classified footage from the Battle of HIP 22460 is leaked to newsfeeds, revealing the so-called 'Thargoid roar' and fuelling public anxiety as intelligence agencies investigate the source.
3308-09-14
Xeno-Peace Activists: ‘We Are The Invaders’
Xeno-peace activist Timothy Culver argues that Thargoid incursions are defensive reprisals for the Proteus Wave and mycoid bioweapon, calling for diplomatic dialogue rather than military action.
3308-09-06
‘Xeno-Peace’ Discussions Gain Momentum
A grassroots xeno-peace movement gains traction following the Battle of HIP 22460, promoting diplomatic dialogue with Thargoids through media figures like Joy Senne and Heimar Borichev.
3305-02-02
Celebrity Admits to Faking Disappearance
Actor Consuela Knight admits her recent disappearance from her yacht was an elaborate publicity hoax designed to revive her fading career, after being discovered living under a false identity at a luxury retreat.
3305-01-24
Commercial Travel Impacted by Hyperspace Fears
The Consuela Knight disappearance causes a drop in consumer confidence for commercial space travel, with luxury yacht sales plummeting and cruise bookings being cancelled across the galaxy.
3305-01-19
Mystery of Missing Crew Sparks Rumours
Journalist Flint 'Firemaker' Lafosse fuels speculation about Consuela Knight's disappearance, suggesting causes ranging from Thargoid weapons to the Far God consuming organic tissue in hyperspace.
3305-01-10
Crew Missing from Celebrity's Starship
Actor Consuela Knight and her four crew members mysteriously vanish from her luxury yacht minutes before arrival at port, leaving the ship perfectly intact with unfinished meals and no signs of escape pod use.
3302-07-21
Galactic News EG Pliots win Rise to Power
The EG Pilots win the Rise to Power campaign after receiving the most salvaged precious gems in the final heat, earning recognition as a major galactic power.
3302-06-30
Community Goal The Rise to Power Begins
The main Dangerous Games 'Rise to Power' competition begins with six factions competing over three weeks; the first heat requires pilots to gather Gilya signature weapons and deliver them to Gohar Station in the Jaradharre system.
3302-06-23
Galactic News EG Pilots win Wildcard Competition
The EG Pilots win the Dangerous Games Wildcard competition after accumulating the most conductive fabrics in the final heat, earning a place to compete against five major factions for official power status starting 30 June.
3302-06-02
Community Goal The Dangerous Games Begin
Five major factions compete in the Dangerous Games to be recognised as an official power, with smaller factions first competing in three-week Wildcard events; the first Wildcard requires pilots to mine gold for their chosen faction.
